title: IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released the official Project Associate Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a 4-Year bachelor’s degree in Chemical/Civil/Environmental Engineering or in Chemistry, Environmental Science, Applied Chemistry can apply online on or before 01 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released the official Project Associate Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a 4-Year bachelor’s degree in Chemical/Civil/Environmental Engineering or in Chemistry, Environmental Science, Applied Chemistry can apply online on or before 01 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: 4-Year bachelor's degree, preferably in Chemical/Civil/Environmental Engineering or in Chemistry, Environmental Science, Applied Chemistry, Master's degree (M.Sc., MTech.)
qualification.details: Project Associate: 4-Year bachelor's degree, preferably in Chemical/Civil/Environmental Engineering or in Chemistry, Environmental Science, Applied Chemistry. Desirable: Master's degree (M.Sc., MTech.). Experience: Work experience of upto 1 year post graduation is desirable. Work experience in project management. Experience in organizing meeting, training programme and stakeholder consultation.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on online application Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Project Associate position at IIT Madras is 01 June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate position announced by IIT Madras in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a 4-Year bachelor's degree, preferably in Chemical/Civil/Environmental Engineering or in Chemistry, Environmental Science, Applied Chemistry. A Master's degree (M.Sc., MTech.) is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 55,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIT Madras Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on the online application, followed by a test/interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IIT Madras for the Project Associate position.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with work experience apply?
faq.answer: Yes, work experience of up to 1 year post-graduation is desirable, especially in project management, organizing meetings, training programs, and stakeholder consultations.

faq.question: Q10. How should I apply for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided 'Apply Online' link on or before the last date of application.
